dungeon.name: Eye of Azshara

location.entrance_notes: Entrance is in eastern Azsuna. Coordinates are treated as source-discovery data until verified against in-game/API data.

dungeon.level_scaling_notes: Item identity and boss loot source must be stored separately from item level. Item level depends on player level, boss level, difficulty, Chromie Time, Timewalking and other current-game contexts.
dungeon.summary: Eye of Azshara is a Legion dungeon in Azsuna with five boss encounters. This normalized candidate file is intended as the machine-readable dungeon-level source for later entity pages and generated indexes.
dungeon.lore_summary_candidate: The dungeon centers on Azshara's forces, the Hatecoil naga, the Tidestone of Golganneth and the Wrath of Azshara as the final elemental manifestation of Azshara's vengeance.
route_notes_candidate: Warlord Parjesh is treated as the first boss in the current source set.
Lady Hatecoil requires nearby Hatecoil Arcanists / shield sources to be handled before the boss is vulnerable; exact count needs verification.
Serpentrix area has dangerous surrounding trash and sinkholes; clear more than seems necessary before pulling.
Wrath of Azshara is final-gated: all four other bosses must be defeated first, then the nearby Naga summoners must be defeated before engagement.
data_quality_notes: Wowhead boss-page drops are useful but mixed with zone drops, Timewalking rows, quest rows, currencies, profession/event rows and unknown rows.
Boss-to-loot data is currently candidate-level and requires Blizzard API and/or in-game verification before high-confidence recommendations.
Unknown or blank values are allowed and should not be invented.
